name: Asatha MasterCard
description: Card can be issued with in-kind warranty or personal guarantee.
full_text:
Asatha MasterCard


--- Benefits ---

• Card can be issued with in-kind warranty or personal guarantee.
• Card can be issued with assets or cash guarantees.
• Card is usable for local and international transactions and repayment is in Egyptian pounds.
• Multiple supplementary cards can be issued.
• Card can be used for online transactions.
• Long grace period at up to 57 days
• Card debit can be repaid through any Banque Misr cash deposit ATMs.
• Card transactions can be paid at any Banque Misr branch across Egypt, every day 24 hours a day at Banque Misr branches located at airports and hotels.
• Promotions and discounts at luxury shopping centers in Egypt and abroad, as specified in the MasterCard Buy 1 Get 1 application
• Free SMS service after each card transaction in addition and a free monthly statement outlining all debit transactions and payments due on the card, as well as issuance and renewal fees.
• Purchasing using Contactless technology to make your shopping safe, fast and easy
• Installment payment for card purchases over up to 36 months with a special interest rate according to the customer's choice.


--- Usage limits ---

Usage limits | Details
Local and international purchases | Within the card credit limits with Maximum 400000 EGP per Month with a limit of 8 times daily
Contactless purchase limit without pin inside Egypt | 600 EGP per transaction with maximum 15 consecutive transaction
Contactless purchase limit without pin outside Egypt | Equivalent to 1500 EGP per transaction with maximum 15 consecutive Transaction
Local purchase transactions | Within the card credit limits
International purchase transactions (In case the customer has informed the bank of the travel) | 100 $ Monthly


--- Fees and charges ---

Fees and charges | Details
Issuance | EGP 150
Renewal | EGP 75
Supplementary cards issuance and renewal | EGP 50
Replacement of lost/damaged cards | EGP 75
Balance inquiry via Banque Misr ATMs | Free
Balance inquiry via other ATMs inside Egypt | EGP 1 per transaction
Balance inquiry via ATMs outside Egypt | EGP 3 per transaction
Interest rate | 3% Monthly ( Decreasing)
Late fee | EGP 75
Exceeding credit limit fee | EGP 75
Transactions outside Egypt (purchases) | 10% of transaction value
Penalty for unjustified disputes over transactions (via fax, email, post, call center) | EGP 50
Printed certified transaction statement, starting from the following month | EGP 20
Requesting clearance letter, certificate of indebtedness or to whom it may concern letter | EGP 50
